options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <<fileName> # Report File Name (string, optional) <<threshold>> # Threshold

options.name: -maxFanout
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of net's fanout

options.name: -minWireLength
options.description: Specifies the minimum wire length of net

options.name: -sort
options.description: {ratio wire_length half_perimeter} Specifies sort of net in report
